sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array (id UInt32, values Array(Int32));
SELECT id, arrayCumSumNonNegative(values) AS non_negative_sums FROM test_array;
UPDATE test_array SET values = arrayCumSumNonNegative(values) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, arrayCumSumNonNegative([values[1], values[2], values[3]]) AS custom_non_negative_sums FROM test_array;
